title: [Snyk Code] Path Traversal
description:
## Path Traversal

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `tools/pull_cold_results_s3.py`
**Location:** line 42, column 24 to line 42, column 34
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-23
### Snippet (tools/pull_cold_results_s3.py:40-44)
```
  40 |                 continue
  41 |             rel = key[len(prefix) :] if key.startswith(prefix) else key
  42 |             out_path = dest / rel
  43 |             out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  44 |             s3.download_file(bucket, key, str(out_path))
```

**Issue Key:** 30be6114-e8b1-4513-b0f6-23fc28d8fc8d

### Details
Path Traversal

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fixed. Added path containment check in tools/pull_cold_results_s3.py: out_path is now resolved and asserted to be under dest before download. Raises ValueError on any S3 key containing path traversal sequences.
